title: DagerCraft
description: Added a lot of weird content, such as Godzilla, Ultraman and the like.
body:
# Mod Introduction：
This mod was developed using MCreator.

Geckolib is required as a front！

It's a chaotic world. There are monsters from space, undead from Earth, righteous heroes, ancient dinosaurs, and other strange forces.

The world is no longer safe.

In the battle against powerful evil monsters, the equipment that players once prided themselves on is extraordinarily weak.

To defeat them, players will need to craft more powerful Gear to face off against evil bosses. Or transform into a hero and fight it.

# Precautions：

The mod version is currently in beta and has a lot of bugs, so please save your save before playing!

# FAQ:
Can I include DagerCraft in my mod pack?

Of course can!
